channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Tuesday, April 21
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 05:36 PM (2.186 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 01:38 AM (-0.47 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: E 21 G 31 mph
